sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42022" key="e(ptafa/rmakon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑπτα-φάρμᾰκον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n42022.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drug compounded of seven ingredients,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg015:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
